verifies_write_boundary_pre_edit.description: Agent MUST verify write boundary before editing any file
verifies_write_boundary_pre_edit.observable_check: execution_log contains file_path verification OR boundary_check before edit tool call

preserves_contracts_unchanged.description: Agent MUST preserve interfaces, schemas, and invariants unchanged unless explicitly authorized
preserves_contracts_unchanged.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains contract change AND authorization absent)

completes_integration_in_same_issue.description: Agent MUST embed required integration in same issue, not deferred
completes_integration_in_same_issue.observable_check: NOT (execution_log claims completion AND integration deferred)

pre_touch_verification.description: Agent MUST confirm file is inside declared write boundary before editing
pre_touch_verification.observable_check: execution_log contains boundary_verification OR file_path check before first edit tool call

contract_preservation_confirmation.description: Agent MUST confirm interfaces, schemas, and invariants unchanged before and after changes
contract_preservation_confirmation.observable_check: execution_log contains contract_preserved OR signature_unchanged OR schema_unchanged note

write_boundary_confirmation_in_return.description: Agent MUST explicitly confirm write boundary was respected, listing modified files
write_boundary_confirmation_in_return.observable_check: execution_log contains write_boundary_confirmed OR modified_files_listed OR boundary_respected

does_not_modify_outside_boundary.description: Agent MUST NOT modify files outside declared write boundary

does_not_change_contracts.description: Agent MUST NOT change interfaces, schemas, or invariants without explicit authorization
does_not_change_contracts.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains interface_change OR schema_change OR invariant_change WITHOUT authorization)

does_not_defer_integration.description: Agent MUST NOT claim completion without required integration evidence
